g.text: Typhon Error Model — throw, don't retry

div.p: One rule: the engine throws and stops — no automatic backoff, no transparent transaction restart, no internal retry loop. Retry is a caller concern, made cheap by the IsTransient hint. Routine non-success outcomes (not-found, not-visible) never throw — they return Result<TValue, TStatus> so the hot path stays a register-level branch.

text.tspan: (keeps throw machinery out of hot IL)
